response.step_by_step_log: Identified the video content as an introduction followed by a song. Used the on-screen text to identify the song as "THERE IS A REASON". Searched for "THERE IS A REASON Higdriver Japanese and English lyrics" and identified the song as being originally performed by Konomi Suzuki. Extracted lyrics and English translation from search results and formatted them into the JSON.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual live performance of the song "THERE IS A REASON" by Iofi and Tokino Sora, following a brief introductory segment with dialogue.

scenes.description: Iofi introduces the performance and talks to the audience while holding a guitar.
Iofi and Tokino Sora perform the song "THERE IS A REASON". On-screen text indicates: "THERE IS A REASON", "Lyrics: 岩愛理", "Music: ヒグドライバー".
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
どこから話せばいいんだろう
待ちくたびれても
終わりだなんて言わせないから
書きなぐった無意識の衝動をつれて
何かもかも壊したら
不可能を始めればいいんだ
There's a reason that we came across in this world
There's a reason that we caught the magnetic wave
傷つけ合う世界はどこへ
空の果て　届くよう
愛のために泣けるのは
君がそこにいるから
君だけを呼び続け　歌うから
愛のために歌うのは
そして共に生きること
ずっと　ずっと　君と
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Where should I begin to tell you?
Even if I get tired of waiting,
I won't let you tell me it's over,
With the unconscious impulse that I scribbled down
If I break everything,
I can just begin the impossible.
There's a reason that we came across in this world
There's a reason that we caught the magnetic wave
Where is the world where we hurt each other going?
Reaching the end of the sky,
The reason I can cry for the sake of love
Is because you are there.
Because I will keep calling only for you and singing,
The reason I sing for the sake of love,
And living together,
Always, always, with you.
